requirement: must contain all fields needed for next admissible transition
examples: Orthad Xi_hat/q/theta/rank; Yi line/place carrier; Wilhelm six lines + selected line; Pencil chart+basis+channel; MFE field+boundary registry

requirement: legal transitions are selected from retained state, not scalar readout alone
examples: Q/B/L; base-8 successor/carry; line flip/selected line; Yin-Yang transform/interpolation; RHS/boundary callbacks

requirement: records transition path but may be insufficient without action registry or carrier fields
examples: Orthad primitive word; monodromy loop; branch grammar primitive word collision
decimal/octal label; semantic text; AIA image; chart components; Shadow comparison channel

requirement: state transfer across lift/re-chart must preserve required invariants or declared carried fields
examples: q/theta carry; vector norm/basis transform; MHD divergence/boundary fields; branch registry
